Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm the Floating Action Button is visible on screens where it should appear
Precondition: User is logged in and on a page that should display the FAB
Steps:
1. Navigate to a page where FAB is specified to appear
2. Observe the bottom-right area of the screen
Expected_Result: FAB widget button is displayed at the bottom-right corner with two icons and '/' separator on yellow background
Specs: A. Widget Button: Nut noi mo option hanh dong nhanh. Display: hai icon va '/' tren nen vien vang (41x32px)

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm the FAB stays fixed in position when the user scrolls the page
Precondition: User is on a page with scrollable content and FAB is displayed
Steps:
1. Scroll down the page using mouse wheel
2. Scroll up the page
3. Scroll using keyboard (Page Down, Page Up, Arrow keys)
Expected_Result: FAB remains visible and fixed at the bottom-right corner throughout scrolling
Specs: A. Widget Button: Fixed position floating button

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm the FAB is hidden for users who should not have access
Precondition: User is not logged in or does not have the required role
Steps:
1. Navigate to a page where FAB would normally appear
2. Observe the bottom-right area of the screen
Expected_Result: FAB is not displayed

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm the FAB persists after refreshing the page
Precondition: User is logged in on a page with the FAB
Steps:
1. Verify FAB is displayed
2. Reload the page (F5 or browser refresh)
3. Observe the FAB area
Expected_Result: FAB is displayed correctly after page reload in collapsed state
Specs: A. Widget Button: Default collapsed state

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm the FAB displays correctly in its default collapsed state
Precondition: User is on a page with the FAB displayed
Steps:
1. Observe the FAB widget button
2. Check the shape, size, background color, and icon layout
Expected_Result:
FAB is a rounded button with yellow background
Size is 41x32px
Two icons displayed with '/' separator between them
Left icon: kudos/write icon, Right icon: the le SAA icon
Specs: A. Widget Button: hai icon va '/' tren nen vien vang (41x32px)

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm the FAB is positioned at the bottom-right corner of the viewport
Precondition: User is on a page with the FAB displayed
Steps:
1. Observe the FAB position on the screen
2. Compare with design spec
Expected_Result: FAB is positioned at the bottom-right corner of the viewport, matching the design specification
Specs: A. Widget Button: Position as per design

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm the FAB shows a light shadow effect on hover
Precondition: User is on a page with the FAB displayed
Steps:
1. Move the mouse cursor over the FAB widget button
2. Observe the visual change
Expected_Result: FAB displays a light shadow effect when hovered
Specs: A. Widget Button: Hover: Bong nhe

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm both icons inside the FAB render correctly
Precondition: User is on a page with the FAB displayed
Steps:
1. Observe the kudos (write) icon on the left
2. Observe the '/' separator
3. Observe the the le SAA icon on the right
Expected_Result: Both icons are clearly visible, properly sized, and the '/' separator is displayed between them
Specs: A.1 icon viet kudos, A.2 icon the le saa: hai icon va '/' tren nen vien vang

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm the FAB floats above all other page content
Precondition: User is on a page with content near the bottom-right corner
Steps:
1. Scroll so that page content overlaps the FAB position
2. Observe whether FAB is above or below the content
Expected_Result: FAB always floats above page content, never hidden behind other elements

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm the FAB displays correctly on mobile viewport
Precondition: Page is viewed on a mobile device or viewport width < 768px
Steps:
1. Resize browser to mobile width (320px - 767px)
2. Observe the FAB position, size, and appearance
Expected_Result: FAB is displayed correctly, positioned at bottom-right, touch target is at least 44x44px

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm the FAB displays correctly on tablet viewport
Precondition: Page is viewed on a tablet device or viewport width 768px - 1023px
Steps:
1. Resize browser to tablet width (768px)
2. Observe the FAB position, size, and appearance
Expected_Result: FAB is displayed correctly at bottom-right corner matching design specs

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm the FAB displays correctly on desktop viewport
Precondition: Page is viewed on a desktop device or viewport width >= 1024px
Steps:
1. Resize browser to desktop width (1024px, 1440px)
2. Observe the FAB position, size, and appearance
Expected_Result: FAB is displayed correctly at bottom-right corner matching design specs

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm FAB layout is not broken when zooming
Precondition: User is on a page with the FAB displayed
Steps:
1. Zoom in to 150%
2. Observe FAB appearance and position
3. Zoom out to 75%
4. Observe FAB appearance and position
Expected_Result: FAB remains properly displayed without layout breakage at various zoom levels

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm clicking the FAB widget button expands to show 2 action options
Precondition: User is on a page with the FAB displayed in collapsed state
Steps: 1. Click on the FAB widget button
Expected_Result: FAB expands to show 2 action options: 'the le SAA' and 'viet kudos' (navigates to expanded state 313:9139)
Specs: A. Widget Button: Click -> Mo 2 option chon xem the le hoac viet kudos. Navigation: on_click -> 313:9139

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm the FAB behaves correctly on double click
Precondition: User is on a page with the FAB displayed in collapsed state
Steps: 1. Double-click on the FAB widget button
Expected_Result: FAB expands to show 2 action options (same as single click), no error or unexpected behavior

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm the FAB is accessible via keyboard Tab navigation
Precondition: User is on a page with the FAB displayed
Steps:
1. Press Tab key repeatedly until focus reaches the FAB
2. Observe focus indicator on the FAB
Expected_Result: FAB receives keyboard focus with visible focus indicator

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm pressing Enter on focused FAB opens the expanded state
Precondition: FAB has keyboard focus
Steps:
1. Tab to the FAB widget button
2. Press Enter key
Expected_Result: FAB expands to show 2 action options (same as click behavior)

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm FAB position does not change when scrolling
Precondition: User is on a scrollable page with the FAB displayed
Steps:
1. Note the FAB position
2. Scroll down using mouse wheel
3. Scroll down using keyboard arrows
4. Scroll using Page Down button
5. Check FAB position after each scroll action
Expected_Result: FAB remains at the same fixed position on screen throughout all scroll methods

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm the hover effect produces a light shadow
Precondition: User is on a page with the FAB displayed
Steps:
1. Move mouse cursor onto the FAB
2. Observe the shadow effect
3. Move mouse cursor away from FAB
4. Observe shadow removal
Expected_Result: Light shadow appears on hover and disappears when cursor moves away
Specs: A. Widget Button: Hover: Bong nhe

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm page background content is fully interactive when FAB is in collapsed state
Precondition: User is on a page with the FAB in collapsed state
Steps:
1. Click on various page elements behind/near the FAB
2. Scroll the page
3. Interact with other UI elements
Expected_Result: All background page elements are fully interactive; FAB does not block interactions except on the FAB button itself

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm clicking the kudos (write) icon within the FAB triggers the expand action
Precondition: User is on a page with the FAB displayed in collapsed state
Steps: 1. Click specifically on the kudos/write icon (left icon) within the FAB
Expected_Result: FAB expands to show 2 action options (navigates to expanded state 313:9139)

Page_Name: Floating Action Button - phim noi chuc nang
Test_Objective: Confirm clicking the the le SAA icon within the FAB triggers the expand action
Precondition: User is on a page with the FAB displayed in collapsed state
Steps: 1. Click specifically on the the le SAA icon (right icon) within the FAB
Expected_Result: FAB expands to show 2 action options (navigates to expanded state 313:9139)
